case_title: KHALED ZEGGAI VS. BELAL ABDOUL WAHAB NASHER

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,555.00 FILED BY ZEGGAI, KHALED AS TO DEFENDANT NASHER, BELAL ABDOUL WAHAB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2010 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40.00) SERVED MAY-09-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NASHER, BELAL ABDOUL WAHAB

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-28-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZEGGAI, KHALED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NASHER, BELAL ABDOUL WAHAB $1,006.66 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,096.66, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1548.71 AND ATTRIBUTES 35% COMPARITIVE NEGLIGENCE TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
